			include = "east_asia_monarchy"
			starting_technology_level = 4
			discovered_regions = {
				italy_region
				iberia_region
				france_region
				north_german_region
				south_german_region
				great_britain_region
				ireland_region
				scandinavian_region
				baltic_region
				balkan_region
				carpathia_region
				maghreb_region
				egypt_region
				nubia_region
				ethiopia_region
				somalia_region
				swahili_coast_region
				arabia_region
				crescent_region
				anatolia_region
				caucasus_region
				persia_region
				khorasan_region
				western_india_region
				central_india_region
				deccan_region
				hindustan_region
				bengal_region
				indian_ocean_region
				east_china_region
			}
			government = {
				type = monarchy
				heir_selection = cognatic_primogeniture
				ruler = antq_augustus
				heir = antq_gaius_caesar
				consort = antq_livia
				ruler_term = { character = antq_augustus start_date = 1.1.1 }
				reforms = {
					antq_principate
				}
				privilege = {
					antq_senatorial_land_exemption
					antq_equestrian_service
					antq_roman_priestly_colleges
					antq_annona_privilege
					antq_praetorian_donatives
				}
				laws = {
					antq_citizenship_law = antq_peregrini_status
					antq_recruitment_law = antq_professional_legions
					antq_roman_coinage_law = antq_augustan_bimetallic_standard
					antq_roman_status_law = antq_roman_slavery_permitted
					antq_roman_cult_law = antq_local_cults_permitted
				}
				centralization_vs_decentralization = 55
				aristocracy_vs_plutocracy = -55
				capital_economy_vs_traditional_economy = 45
			}
			capital = rome
		}

		JUD = { # Herodian Judea; P8.1;OCD
			own_control_core = {
				jerusalem
			}

			include = "east_asia_monarchy"
			starting_technology_level = 3
			discovered_regions = {
				crescent_region
				anatolia_region
				arabia_region
				egypt_region
			}
			government = {
				type = monarchy
				heir_selection = cognatic_primogeniture
				ruler = antq_herod_archelaus
				ruler_term = { character = antq_herod_archelaus start_date = 1.1.1 }
				reforms = {
					antq_client_monarchy
				}
				privilege = {
					antq_client_royal_autonomy
					antq_second_temple_priesthood
				}
				laws = {
					antq_client_governance_law = antq_roman_client_compact
					antq_judean_temple_law = antq_temple_priestly_administration
				}
				centralization_vs_decentralization = 20
				aristocracy_vs_plutocracy = -20
				capital_economy_vs_traditional_economy = 25
			}
			capital = jerusalem
		}

		XAB = { # Herodian Galilee-Peraea; P8.1;OCD;PLE
			own_control_core = {

			starting_technology_level = 3

					antq_client_royal_autonomy
				}

				}

		XAC = { # Herodian Batanea; P8.1;OCD;PLE
			own_control_core = {
				antilebanon_mountains1
			}

			include = "east_asia_monarchy"
			starting_technology_level = 3
			discovered_regions = {
				crescent_region
				anatolia_region
				arabia_region
				egypt_region
			}
			government = {
				type = monarchy
				heir_selection = cognatic_primogeniture
				ruler = antq_philip_tetrarch
